tuning_key.text: Peering into the divide, praying it will provide / Answers to assist us on this ride
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: The divide you're standing at isn't a problem to solve—it's momentum asking you to move. Courage isn't the absence of uncertainty; it's the body's refusal to wait for permission from a mind that will never have all the answers. Today, the frequency is simple: the next step is already here. Take it.

practice.title: Ground the Drive
practice.instruction: Feel your feet (or seat, or hands) make contact with what holds you, and notice the subtle pressure—this is the earth already supporting the movement you're about to make.

practice.title: Name the Divide
practice.instruction: Speak aloud one thing you've been hesitating about, and as you speak it, let your breath continue steady and full—the words move through you, not into a void.

practice.title: Step Into the Frequency
practice.instruction: Take three deliberate steps (or three full breaths if stationary), feeling the rhythm of your own momentum, and play the echo audio—let the frequency anchor what your body already knows.
